1) Automation scope and guardrails

detailMarkdown:
# Unraid API Automation Operator Skill

Build practical Unraid API automations for server operations, health checks, and routine maintenance with safe execution controls.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/unraid-api-automation-operator.zip -o unraid-api-automation-operator.zip && unzip -o unraid-api-automation-operator.zip -d ./unraid-api-automation-operator
```

## Usage
Use this skill for safe Unraid automations that reduce repetitive admin work without risking host stability.
